name: profile loader rejects a rule configured with a three-element array (the architecture array form is exactly two elements: severity and options)
command:
mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:
  no-eval:
    - error
    - {allowGlobal: true}
    - extra
' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain no-eval --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'array_length=3' err.txt && grep -q 'expected_length=2' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
